disambiguation_rules.director of the national institute of st: Confirmed in SEC. 4(a) and (b) as consultation partner on precision agriculture standards development
disambiguation_rules.foreign adversary: Defined in SEC. 2(3) as foreign government or nongovernment person engaged in conduct adverse to U.S. national security
disambiguation_rules.foreign_adversary: Defined in SEC. 2(3) as foreign government or nongovernment person engaged in long-term pattern or serious instances of conduct significantly adverse to U.S. national security
disambiguation_rules.secretary_confirmed: SEC. 4(a) and (b) confirm 'Secretary' = Secretary of Agriculture directing interconnectivity standards development with NIST and FCC consultation
disambiguation_rules.director_nist_confirmed: SEC. 4(a) and (b) confirm Director of the National Institute of Standards and Technology as consultation partner on precision agriculture standards
